===Pokémon: Twilight Wings===
Melony appeared as a visual in ''[[TW05|Assistant]]'', where she battled [[Gordie]]'s {{p|Coalossal}} in its [[Gigantamax]] form.

She physically appeared in ''[[TW07|Sky]]'', where she gave her thoughts about [[Leon]] in an interview.

In ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]'', Melony was seen relaxing at the Hero's Bath in [[Circhester]] with her {{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Darmanitan}} and {{p|Frosmoth}} after receiving an invitation letter for the [[Galarian Star Tournament]]. She was later seen at [[Wyndon Stadium]], walking out onto the field for the tournament's opening ceremony.
